title: Unraveling the Genetic and Molecular Architecture of Autism Spectrum Disorder: Implications for Clinical Genetics and Genomic Diagnostics
summary: Review summarizing ASD genetic architecture including CNVs, SNVs, de novo vs inherited variants, and convergent biological pathways (transcriptional regulation, chromatin remodeling, synaptic function). Discusses diagnostic yield limitations of array-CGH, WES, and WGS.
